title: avatar but it's rpg
description: A lightweight Fabric modpack focused on both combat and exploration
body:
# RPG AVATAR
## Features
Rpg where you can choose to bend from four elements, kudos to the Elementals mod.
As well as:
- photography
- thirst
- better combat
- map atlases
- voice chat

best when played with friends and on a self-hosted server.


reccomended for client side.
